docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2007 BY JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS, CLERK S. VANTREE. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM, RUSSELL DAVIS, CLERK S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUCAS, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SECURITY EXPRESS $50.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $110.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
